Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/ITC.asp

# Export Route to SBDC International Trade Center

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
When a user wants to export, sell globally, research countries, prepare export financing, or understand trade documentation, route to the SBDC International Trade Center and avoid final legal/customs advice.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
